commands.prompt: Show me a summary of the git repository status: current branch, recent commits (last 5), any uncommitted changes, and branches that are ahead/behind remote. Format it as a clean report.

Run the project's test suite (detect from package.json — jest, vitest, mocha, etc.). Show me: total tests, passed, failed, and skipped. If any tests failed, show the failure details. Keep the output concise.

onComplete.extraPrompt: Include the test results in the report.

commands.prompt: Run the project's build command (detect from package.json — 'npm run build', 'tsc', etc.). Report whether the build succeeded or failed. If it failed, show the errors and suggest fixes.
Based on any data passed to you, compile a brief project health report. Include sections for: Test Results, Build Status, and any Issues Found. Format it as markdown. Keep it concise and actionable.
